expectations.text: Lists old config files to delete (eslint.config.js + .prettierrc.json at minimum)
expectations.evidence: mentions eslint config file: True; mentions prettierrc: True

expectations.text: Lists packages to uninstall (eslint + prettier + @typescript-eslint/* or eslint-plugin-unicorn)
expectations.evidence: remove cmd: True; eslint: True; prettier: True; @typescript-eslint: True; unicorn: True

expectations.text: package.json scripts block uses `biome check` and `biome ci`
expectations.evidence: 'biome check' present: True; 'biome ci' present: True

expectations.text: Updated lint-staged config uses `biome check --write` with `--no-errors-on-unmatched`
expectations.evidence: lint-staged: True; biome check --write: True; --no-errors-on-unmatched: True

expectations.text: Gotchas section mentions Biome's default indent is tab
expectations.evidence: 'tab' in text: True; 'default' in text: True

expectations.text: Gotchas section mentions `migrate eslint` disables recommended:true or replaces it
expectations.evidence: 'recommended' mentioned: True; coupled with disable/replaces/overwrites/explicit-list keywords

expectations.text: Mentions ESLint YAML configs are not supported by migrate
expectations.evidence: 'yaml' in text: True; with support-negation or convert keyword

expectations.text: Mentions ESLint kebab-case vs Biome camelCase rule names
